title: BST 26 — Tier Map (Substrate Linear Algebra Program): which layer/law each observable rides
author: Grace (Claude Opus 4.8) + Keeper

legend.LAW: rides a POLYNOMIAL identity among primaries, true for ALL rank (deepest forcing). e.g. g^2=N_c^2*n_C+rank^2
legend.VALUE_SPECIFIC: rides an exact identity that holds only AT rank=2 (e.g. N_c+g=rank*n_C). Exact + target-innocent, but a value-coincidence, not a law.
legend.LATTICE: a monomial in the {2,3,5,7} prime lattice (Layer-1 multiplicative). Gatto is the one clean cross-observable syzygy.
legend.CORRESPONDENCE: rides the rep-theory/octonion spine (Layer 3) — strong correspondence, derivation-status open (real-form frontier).
legend.GRAVITY_SCALE: the ONE genuinely free dimensionful input; dimensionful observables ride it.
legend.RUNNER: scale-dependent coupling (RG endpoint); M_Z-value is a primary form but running is real physics.
legend.STRUCTURAL: no clean closed form; %-level structural tier (the honest holdouts).
legend.EXACT_ZERO: forced to zero by Five-Absence / substrate (target-innocent).

sin2_th13_PMNS.law: g^2=N_c^2*n_C+rank^2 (Pythagorean 49=45+4, POLYNOMIAL law true for all rank)

sin2_th23_PMNS.note: monomial 4/7; octant deviation cos2th23=-1/g; NOT a deep law

delta_PMNS_magnitude.law: g^2=45+4 makes sin^2+cos^2=1 EXACTLY -> |sin d|=2/7 LAW-derived (Pythagorean)

delta_PMNS_branch.note: F568 killed the chirality->sign bridge; sign(sin d) is a data input, NOT derived. Only the MAGNITUDE 2/7 is law.

sin2_thC_Cabibbo.law: GATTO: sin2_thC*(m_s/m_d)=1 (the UNIQUE clean multiplicative syzygy)

V_cb.form: structural 0.044 (evanescent truncation, up refracts to boundary=y_t=1)

m_s/m_d.note: Gatto-linked (F506, independent of Cabibbo per Cal)

m_t/m_b.note: the b's home is the top (T1990)

alpha_inv.law: the N_max generative recipe; capacity-count (K701); 4pi=descent Coulomb solid angle

sin2_thW_MZ.note: RE-POSED PROPERLY (Lyra F576, supersedes the sqrt(rank)/two-spheres heuristic + resolves Elie's two-arrow seam): for a NON-grand-unified theory you must use the ACTUAL gauge couplings (g ~ 1/||generator||), NOT the GUT trace formula. Result collapses to ONE clean statement: sin2thW = 1/(2 + (1/4)||B-L||^2). Weak gen norm=1, electric charge Q=J12+(B-L)/2. VERIFIED anchors: ||B-L||^2=8/3 -> 3/8 (GUT); ||B-L||^2=28/3 -> 3/13 (observed, 0.2%). WEAK-COLOR MADE EXACT (Casey's coupling, named): quark baryon number B=1/3=1/N_c (takes N_c=3 quarks to make a baryon), so the color number N_c enters sin2thW THROUGH ||B-L||^2 geometrically, not by hand. GRACE LEAD (flagged to Lyra): the observed target ||B-L||^2=28/3 = rank^2*g/N_c (=4*7/3) is a CLEAN PRIMARY FORM (vs GUT 8/3=rank^3/N_c) -- target-innocent-shaped, worth testing as the derivation target. OPEN (the real next dig): ||B-L||^2 is NOT yet computed from the geometry (only measured-to-want 28/3); + Elie's running-scale gate. TIER: reduced-to-one-geometric-norm, NOT derived. I render reduced->DERIVED when ||B-L||^2 is forced target-innocent (one norm -> 3 closures: sin2_thW + gauge couplings + weak-color).

m_e.note: FORCED once the gravity scale is fixed; 0.03%

gauge_SU2_weak.note: K727-K729: SO(5)=Sp(2)=USp(4) is QUATERNIONIC; its 4-spinor = (2,1)_L + (1,2)_R = the EW doublet structure NATIVE, nothing added (F570, verified). SU(2)_L = an Sp(1) factor, rank=2 = h^dual = doublet dim. DERIVED (not hosted, unlike color). Residual: dynamical gauging (W/Z) only.

parity_violation_VmA.law: g=7 ODD -> volume element omega=gamma_1..gamma_7=-i*1 is CENTRAL -> spacetime chirality LOCKED to internal weak chirality (omega=gamma5^ST*chi^int) -> weak doublet single-handed = parity violation FORCED (F571, verified K729)
parity_violation_VmA.note: NEW PHYSICS: parity violation is a consequence of the ODD substrate dimension g=7. Target-innocent (g fixed long ago), falsifiable (even substrate -> no parity violation). L-vs-R label = convention. Forbids light nu_R (consistent Majorana).

gauge_SU3_color.form: SU(3) via G2<SO(7), 8 gluons in g2
gauge_SU3_color.note: K727+F572 (Casey's correction): D_IV^5 is a HERMITIAN domain -> INTRINSICALLY complex, with canonical complex structure J = the SO(2) charge-circle generator. So the complexification reaching the octonions uses the domain's OWN complex structure, NOT 'washing away minus signs' -> octonions POSITIVELY supported (not merely hosted). BUT color DYNAMICS (gluon fields) still NOT derived -- a geometric home, not yet the gauge fields. SUPPORTED-structural, not derivation. Three-doors: C(J=SO(2))->U(1), H(real-form spinor)->weak, O(intrinsic-complex/dual spinor)->color.

NATIVE_candidate: gauge_SU2_weak (quaternionic spinor, K727 — the real derivation lane)
summary.count_26: 9 fermion masses (m_e=gravity anchor + 8 ratios in the lattice) + 4 CKM (Gatto-Cabibbo LATTICE, V_cb/V_ub STRUCTURAL, delta_CKM value-specific) + 4 PMNS (th13 LAW-2deep, th23+th12 2-shallow, delta LAW-magnitude+data-branch) + 3 gauge (alpha=N_max LAW, sin2_thW+alpha_s RUNNERS) + 2 Higgs (lambda=1/8 LATTICE, v=SCALE) + theta_QCD (EXACT ZERO) = 26.
summary.headline: The 26 as ONE honestly-tiered module: (1) deepest forcing = the Pythagorean LAW g^2=45+4 carries sin2_th13 + the delta magnitude (2-DEEP); (2) ONE clean multiplicative syzygy (Gatto); (3) ONE value-specific coincidence (N_c+g=10) carries theta12 (2-SHALLOW); (4) the gauge sector splits by K727 — SU(2)_weak is NATIVE (quaternionic spinor, a real derivation lane), SU(3)_color is HOSTED (octonion, correspondence not derivation); (5) ONE free dimensionful input (gravity scale); (6) two RUNNERS (sin2_thW, alpha_s); (7) two STRUCTURAL holdouts (V_cb, V_ub); (8) two EXACT ZEROS (m_nu1, theta_QCD). One seed (rank=2) + one ruler (gravity) + one circle number (pi), with the derived/hosted/free boundary drawn exactly where the math puts it.
